global-promo.top-text-1: This is not just a theme!
global-promo.top-text-2: It's a whole boilerplate and template to get your website up and running in no time.
global-promo.footer-text: Explore our app. It's free. No credit card required.

404.title: 404 - Not Found
404.message:
Ooops. You somehow found a page that does not exist.
Maybe never existed or was deleted.

Please check the URL or go back to the main page.

home.title: Welcome to Stardrive - the Astro Boilerplate
home.description: Stardrive is a complete Astro boilerplate and template to get your website up and running in no time with all the features you need to win.
home.hero-title: The power of Astro, but on steroids.
home.hero-sub-slogan: Create super stable and fast websites in the AI age.

features.title: Features
features.description: Explore the powerful features of Astro Stardrive that make it the ultimate boilerplate for your next project.

docs.description-install: Learn how to install Astro Stardrive and get your project up and running quickly.
docs.description-configuration: Configure Astro Stardrive to suit your project's needs.
docs.description-guide: Follow the guide to understand how to effectively use Astro Stardrive.

examples.title: Real-World Examples
examples.description: Discover real-world examples of websites built with Astro Stardrive to inspire your next project.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about Astro Stardrive.

about.title: About us
about.description: Learn more about the team behind some fictitious company - this is for demo purposes.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Get in touch with nobody - this is for demo purposes only - use GitHub for inquiries.
contact.intro-text: Have a question, an idea or just want to say hi? Drop us a line and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.docs-text: Most answers are already in our documentation.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thanks! Your message is on its way.
contact.invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.tool-description: Send a message to the company through the contact form.
contact.tool-name-param: The full name of the person sending the message.
contact.tool-email-param: The email address to reply to.
contact.tool-message-param: The content of the message or inquiry.

pricing.title: Our Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that suits your needs. No worries! Stardrive is free - this is for demo purposes only.

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Learn how to integrate Astro Stardrive with your existing tools and workflows.
integration.intro: Integrate with your favorite tools and platforms to supercharge your development workflow.

integration-ai.title: AI Integration
integration-ai.description: Discover coding assistants to help you work with Astro Stardrive even more efficiently. Stardrive is already prepared to talk to them.

integration-zapier.title: Zapier Integration
integration-zapier.description: Learn how to connect Astro Stardrive with thousands of apps using Zapier for seamless automation. This is more of a demo collection, since there is no real use case for this.

get-listed.title: Get Listed
get-listed.description: Learn how to get your website listed as a real world example.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.description: Use this page to promote a signup, directly add a respective form, or redirect to another page. This is for demo purposes only, since there is no real signup form here.
